name: store_weekly_sales_partial_join
description: Multi-series weekly demand forecasting (one series per store) built from a fact panel plus two store dimension tables that must be joined before training. The target is units_sold and each store is a separate series (series_id = store_id). Three source files must be uploaded together: store_weekly_sales.csv (panel, 20 stores x 60 weeks), store_directory.csv (join: store_weekly_sales.store_id = store_directory.store_code), and store_demographics.csv (join: store_weekly_sales.store_id = store_demographics.store_ref). The join keys have DIFFERENT column names across files and must be matched semantically. This scenario stress-tests partial-coverage joins on a NON-date key: store_directory is MISSING several stores referenced by the panel (orphan foreign keys, so a left join leaves some store attributes null), whereas store_demographics contains MORE stores than the panel uses (foreign key is a subset of the primary key). Store attributes are STATIC per store (temporal=false): orphans are filled cross-sectionally (median / 'unknown'), never with a fabricated temporal trend. Used to validate how join discovery reports coverage, containment and cardinality on a forecasting panel, and how the controller tolerates incomplete referential integrity.

columns.name: week
columns.description: Monday of the ISO week (YYYY-MM-DD). Source: store_weekly_sales.csv.

columns.name: store_id
columns.description: Store identifier and series id (e.g. ST01). Join key to store_directory.store_code and store_demographics.store_ref. Source: store_weekly_sales.csv.

columns.name: units_sold
columns.description: Weekly units sold for the store. TARGET COLUMN (the time series). Source: store_weekly_sales.csv.

columns.name: region
columns.description: Store region. STATIC store attribute. Source: store_directory.csv (joined on store_id = store_code). Orphan stores absent from the directory are filled cross-sectionally with the explicit 'unknown' category (not fabricated).

columns.name: store_size_sqm
columns.description: Store sales-floor area in square metres. STATIC store attribute. Source: store_directory.csv (joined on store_id = store_code). Orphan stores are filled with the cross-sectional median (a documented placeholder, not the true value).

columns.name: store_type
columns.description: Store format. STATIC store attribute. Source: store_directory.csv (joined on store_id = store_code). Orphan stores are filled with the explicit 'unknown' category.

columns.name: population_k
columns.description: Catchment population in thousands. STATIC exogenous attribute (known future). Source: store_demographics.csv (joined on store_id = store_ref). Full coverage.

columns.name: median_age
columns.description: Catchment median age. STATIC exogenous attribute (known future). Source: store_demographics.csv (joined on store_id = store_ref).

columns.name: urban_flag
columns.description: 1 if the store is in an urban area, else 0. STATIC exogenous attribute (known future). Source: store_demographics.csv (joined on store_id = store_ref).
